nasb.text: But Jesus answered the one who was telling Him and said, “Who is My mother and who are My brothers?”

esv.text: But he replied to the man who told him, “Who is my mother, and who are my brothers?”

cnv.text: 他回答那人：“誰是我的母親？誰是我的弟兄？”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“谁是我的母亲？谁是我的兄弟？”

csbs.text: 耶稣回答那对他说话的人，说：“我的母亲是谁呢？我的弟兄是谁呢？”
